Video.summary: Nikki Boxlerĺs life in Update New York on her family farm raising cattle and producing maple syrup is a few thousand miles from the hills of New Mexico. Weĺll take a look into Nikkiĺs life back home and then follow along as she visits the small town of Quemado and its bustling population of 228, while she pursues bugling elk with her favorite Winchester in hand. Weĺll also head to Missouri and Texas to chase whitetails with Chris Keefer and Paul Sawyer.
Video.title: ôNew Mexico Magicö

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends on board the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. This trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the skilled captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.
Video.title: "Billfish Tourney"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin and Florida WaterSports pro Jeff Lange go deep off Panama City Beach to test the limits of a new battery powered reel. The results are surprising.
Video.title: "Electric Deep Drop"

Video.summary: Discover the pressing threat of Chronic Wasting Disease in North American whitetail deer and the fierce debate around the strategies aimed at its management.
Video.title: "Battling Disease in Whitetail"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Saltwater Experience Chartersĺ Captain Garrett Stephens for a trip into the Gulf. When their catches get repeatedly cut off, they decide to bring the massive bull sharks up to the surface for a closer look.
Video.title: "Gulf Monsters With Captain Garrett Stephens"

Video.summary: After wrestling with some massive bull sharks, Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor and guest Captain Garrett Stephens encounter some crazy cobia action and it takes all their strength and skill to keep them away from the sharks.
Video.title: "Cobia Fishing With Garrett Stephens"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor utilize the Yellowfin Hybrid 26ĺ to bring the Live Paddle Boards out to an Islamorada flat for a fun day of fishing for bonefish and some toothy critters.
Video.title: "Islamorada Paddleboard Fishing"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run west from Hawks Cay to fish the spring tarpon migration at the legendary Bahia Honda bridge.
Video.title: "Bahia Honda Tarpon"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head down to Key West to join Captain Brandon Cyr for some skinny water bonefishing.
Video.title: "Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"

Image.alt: "Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"
"Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"
"Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish the Lower Keys with Captain Brandon Cyr for baby tarpon in the mangroves.
Video.title: "Baby Tarpon with Captain Brandon Cyr"

Video.summary: CA heads to the space coast for a mixed bag of drum.
Video.title: "Drumroll Please"

Video.summary: CA fishes the ultra shallow ponds in Flagler beach for reds and snook.
Video.title: "The Pond"

Video.summary: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms. Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring. They had hunted deer with Cody and Cassie but neither had hunted turkeys in Iowa. They are hoping for a little luck with the gobblers, and they know they are going to have a good time trying.
Video.title: "Iowa Turkey, .410's and Reapers"

Video.summary: Dan Schmidt and Mark Kayser share insights into the natural behavior of whitetail bucks, particularly during the rutting season, and how scrapes play into their territorial and mating behaviors.
Video.title: "Whitetail Billboards"

Video.summary: We join Blake Barnett alongside hunter Jimmy Reynolds as they take part in the 2nd Annual Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. This meaningful whitetail hunt is made possible by the great folks at Disabled Outdoorsmen. Jimmy settles in at the G2 Ranch in South Texas, where prime whitetail country and a shared passion for the outdoors set the stage for an unforgettable hunt.
Video.title: "Disabled Outdoorsmen"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: Mike had a little bit of a struggle to kickoff his 2024 Missouri Spring Turkey season. The birds seemed to be in a bit a of funky stage and wouldn't fully commit until later on in the season. After multiple failed attempts Mike finally finds a lonely gobbler in the right mood!
Video.title: "Tough Missouri Gobbler"

Video.summary: Good friend Mike Stone invites Willi to hunt his family ranch in Oklahoma. Good friend, Tom Petry goes along to film for his school, ôFilm The Huntö and hopefully capture Willi shooting a good, Oklahoma buck.
Video.title: "The Stone Ranch"

Video.summary: Randy Kitts heads to Canadian Whitetail Outfitters in Northern Saskatchewan for a chance a at a multi-droptine nontypical bush buck with his bow.
Video.title: s - "Georgia Boy"

Video.summary: Todd Rogers embraces the business of being a hunting outfitter as a labor of love. And while so many family-run operations are dwindling in rural America, the Rogers legacy is here to stay. Will Cooper and Josh Dahlke return to western Oklahoma to share this story while pursuing brush-country whitetails in the red dirt.
Video.title: "UNBROKEN"

Video.summary: Jeff Lindsey has always had one dream as a land owner, and after over a decade of managing his Illinois farm, his dream finally came trueŚa MEGA 200" giant buck! This story began three years ago when Jeff passed on this deer at just 26 yards. Back then, he was a 175" 4.5-year-old stud, but he took a gamble and let him walk... hoping heĺd one day break the magical 200" mark.
Video.title: "A MEGA 200" Illinois Buck"

Video.summary: With human populations scattered through the landscape, human-wildlife conflict is a common occurrence in Borneo. Dan Cabela travels to the area to participate in an ambitious elephant collaring project, hoping to better understand how people and elephants can live harmoniously.
Video.title: "Human-wildlife conflict in Borneo"

Video.summary: Buckmasters, Honey Brake and Realtree have joined forces with Big Dream Outdoors to get Justin Webb and Brandi Deese a grand slam on video this spring. Justin completes the first leg of the slam with a 2-for-1 Osceola special. Next stop-Texas for the Rio!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Osceola Dreams"

Video.summary: Last summer Cam Rhoden and his family were told that he may never breath on his own again, much less walk. After meeting David Blanton during his rehab at the Shepherd Center, they made plans to go on a Georgia turkey hunt. Cam is not only walking - heĺs walking to a Georgia Gobbler!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "A Walk To Remember"

Video.summary: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Gold Star Youth Turkey"

Video.summary: Second leg in the slam is complete! Justin Webb killed his Rio in Texas. - Next stop - Tennessee for the Eastern.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Rio Dreams"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike joins a local legend in the waters of Amelia Island, exploring its rich fishery and targeting redfish, trout, and more in this coastal gem.
Video.title: "Amelia Angler"

Video.summary: We head back to the Mecca of Jumbo Perch at Lake Cascade, ID!
Video.title: "Cascade Gold"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss shares the skiff with the creator of D.O.A. Lures, Capt. Mark Nichols, in Stuart, Florida.
Video.title: ôMr. D.O.A.ö

Video.summary: The biteĺs dead during a neap tide, but Josh and Isaiah donĺt back down. Watch them adapt, pivot, and turn a tough day into a hard-earned win. Itĺs not luckŚitĺs hustle.
Video.title: "Neap tide Hustle"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins his wife, ôThe Amazing Katie Raskobö on a big adventure for his 500th slam.
A look back at the the wild ride to get to the tenth season of Silver Kings and all the adventures along the way.
Video.title: "10 Seasons"

Video.summary: Another great hunt this week with Intrepid Care. We have the chance to hang out with some Veterans from all over the country. We gather to tell stories, build relationships, and just enjoy the great outdoors. This trip is action packed and the guys are chasing South Texas hogs from the ground.
Video.title: "Intrepid Care"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Captain Tony Young for a day of offshore fishing and free diving out of Islamorada.
Video.title: "Islamorada Offshore With Capt. Tony Young"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head deep into the Everglades to target snook in the murky waters of Lake Ingraham.
Video.title: "Lake Ingraham Snook"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike Frenette takes Blair off the coast of Louisiana to catch their limit of red snapper.
Video.title: s - "The Other Redfish"

Video.summary: Capt. Jason Dozier and Janot take a break from the guided trips, and take themselves on a hunting adventure.
Video.title: "The Flying Shot"

Video.summary: Heavy hearts find comfort in cherished memories as the Local Knowledge crew mourns the loss of one of the greatest members of the fishing industry. Looking back on several of our episodes with our dear friend Dave Salazar, we celebrate the life of this amazing fishermen, family man, and visionary behind the world renowned Casa Vieja Lodge.
Video.title: "El Jefe"

Video.summary: The ability to overcome obstacles and challenging conditions can be key to success, but when fishing in Key West, cold temps are rarely the hurdle. For Rush and Ali, it's another day on the water where patience and a plan pays off with Cobia and Amberjack action that gets the rods bent after a cold weather spell in the Keys.
Video.title: "Cobia So Cold"

Video.summary: When it comes to fishing in Key West, you can often get a lot done in a little bit of time. After an early check in to Oceanĺs Edge Resort and a mid day departure from then dock, Ali looks to Rush to put him on an afternoon bite of tuna and bottom fish that few other places can offer. If Rush is going to deliver, he will need to make a plan and stick to it to make the best use of this limited time.
Video.title: "Afternoon Delight"

Video.summary: For Ali and Rush, one of the best aspects of fishing is being able to share experiences on the water with interesting people. On this episode we invite luxury watch enthusiast Eric Rivera - AKA "Watch Eric" to the Florida Keys to target Permit and Amberjack in the Gulf.
Video.title: "Watch Eric"

Video.summary: ôPart of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.ö -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"

Video.summary: Willi and Chris have hunted NM for years with some success each year. This year they include two new friends, Nick Ventura and his dad. They receive rain like they never had before and when they finally make it out to hunt, Willi is hoping to connect.
Video.title: "Willi's New Mexico Thunder Bull"

Video.summary: Willi and friend, Rob Shaw hunt whitetails with their bows with Phire Creek Outdoors. They both hope Phire Creek and Kansas live up to their reputations of big whitetail bucks.
Video.title: "Kansas Giant Whitetails, Hits And Misses"

Video.summary: David Blanton heads to Mississippi to hunt his friend Richard Reid's property. Setting up in the dark proves to make the difference as the birds fly down into the field!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David Mississippi"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade gives you the grand tour of his home property. Sladeĺs dream was the same as many others, have a place where he can build a home, raise a family, and also have plenty of room to enjoy the outdoors and chase big rack bucks. Slade gives you a breakdown of how he took his raw tract of land and turned it into a beautiful homestead and outdoor paradise. If you are interested in how you can achieve your dream of raising a family on a dream property, this is the episode for you.
Video.title: "Cribs"

Video.summary: It's the next Grand Slam stop. The Spring Thunder crew hunts eastern wild turkeys in Georgia. They get there just in the nick of time. When they arrive at producer James Thompsons' farm, a screaming bird is waiting for them.
Video.title: "7-Day Slam: Eastern Turkeys in the Swamp | "

Image.alt: "7-Day Slam: Eastern Turkeys in the Swamp | "
"7-Day Slam: Eastern Turkeys in the Swamp | "
"7-Day Slam: Eastern Turkeys in the Swamp | "

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Minnesota can be tough during opening week, but this season started on fire. Strutters in the decoys, hard-gobbling timber birds, fanning a solo tom ů this episode has it all.
Video.title: "Minnesota Turkey Hunting: Season Kickoff"

Video.summary: The TURKEY POSSE is on a three-state turkey hunting quest in the Northeast. Josh Dahlke stops in Maine and goes after a sneaky river-bottom gobbler.
Video.title: "TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"

Image.alt: "TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"
"TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"
"TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"

Video.summary: Watch the video to learn more about bonefish and tarpon connectivity and the importance of conservation at local and regional levels.
Video.title: "Bonefish And Tarpon Connectivity"
